productDisplayName: Timberland Men Jeunes Brown Casual Shoes
description: Dress your growing up kids in absolute comfort in the timberland Mallard Youth Hook and Loop Boot, and watch them enjoy in stylish comfort. Designed with a nubuck, suede and wool upper, this shoe is sure to keep your young one's feet fresh and comfortable all day long.UpperNubuck and suede upper for absolute durability and comfortVelcro closure straps on the midfoot to offer a customised FitWool inner lining with Gore-Tex technology for absolute waterproof comfort and insulationCushioned footbed with a fabric lining for sweat-free all-day comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for impact protection and all-day comfortOutsoleNon-marking rubber outsole with flex grooves and circular nubs for absolute grip and tractionCurved midfoot for inner arch supportBoot careWipe dust with a clean and dry clothUse a nubuck and suede brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
